title: Roadmap Recovery Brief: ProductOS PM Takeover

now_items.title: Takeover orchestration flow
now_items.summary: Build and validate the end-to-end takeover pipeline that imports an existing product workspace and produces all takeover artifacts.

now_items.title: Takeover artifact schemas and examples
now_items.summary: Define and validate the four new takeover artifact schemas with example payloads.

next_items.title: Live external research integration
next_items.summary: Wire live research refresh into the takeover flow so competitor and market artifacts are updated from external sources automatically.

next_items.title: Visual atlas validation
next_items.summary: Validate the visual product atlas against real-world screenshot ingestion and ensure proper linking to journey stages.

later_items.title: Autonomous evidence refresh loop
later_items.summary: Enable the living system to autonomously detect stale evidence and queue refresh tasks without PM intervention.

later_items.title: Multi-workspace portfolio takeover
later_items.summary: Extend the takeover flow to support importing and analyzing multiple product workspaces in a single portfolio view.

open_decisions.question: Which external research provider should be the default for live competitor and market refresh?
open_decisions.impact: Determines the quality and freshness of competitive intelligence in takeover outputs.

open_decisions.question: Should screenshots and visual evidence be stored in the repo or referenced from external storage?
open_decisions.impact: Impacts workspace size, portability, and collaboration model.

unresolved_evidence_gaps.description: Live research refresh has not been validated end-to-end with a real external search provider.
Screenshot ingestion produces structured records but provenance confidence is inferred, not confirmed by PM review.

confidence_assessment.biggest_risk: Live research integration depends on external provider availability and may introduce latency or quality variance.
confidence_assessment.recommended_focus: Complete the core takeover orchestration and schema validation before expanding into live research.
